---
title: "DRiDO Figures 1 and 2"
author: "Johanna Fleischman"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
    code_folding: hide 
---

# Setup 

## Install Packages

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
suppressMessages(library(patchwork))
suppressMessages(library(flexclust))
suppressMessages(library(ggrepel))
suppressMessages(library(RColorBrewer))
suppressMessages(library(survival))
suppressMessages(library(VennDiagram))
suppressMessages(library(ggh4x))
suppressMessages(library(ggpmisc))
suppressMessages(library(tidyverse))
suppressMessages(library(mclust))
suppressMessages(library(GGally))

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = TRUE, out.height = "100%", out.width = "100%", warning = F, message = F)
```

## Load and Clean Data

```{r}
# set
# local_filepath <- "~/drido-multiomic-paper"

source(file.path(local_filepath, "R/statistics_functions.R"))
source(file.path(local_filepath, "R/figure_functions.R"))

lipidomics_data <- "inst/extdata/20250128-Normalized-Lipidomics-Data.Rds"
metabolomics_data <- "inst/extdata/20250128-Normalized-Metabolomics-Data.Rds"
proteomics_data <- "inst/extdata/20250129-Normalized-Proteomics-Data.Rds"
phenotype_data <- "inst/extdata/DOCR_Phenotype_Data.csv"
name_conv_file <- "inst/supp_tables/Table_S1_CompoundAnnotations.csv"
lm_res_file <- "inst/extdata/20250417-Linear-MM-Age-Diet-Results.Rds"

# Read in model analyses
lm_res <- readRDS(file.path(local_filepath, lm_res_file))

# Clean compound names
compound_summary <- read.csv(file.path(local_filepath, name_conv_file))
name_conversion_use <- read.csv(file.path(local_filepath, name_conv_file)) %>%
  dplyr::select(name_use, feature_id)

# Make final DO-CR raw data frame
# Retains pre-diet intervention data
data_use <- docr_make_final_data(
  metabolomics_data_filepath = file.path(local_filepath, metabolomics_data),
  proteomics_data_filepath = file.path(local_filepath, proteomics_data),
  lipidomics_data_filepath = file.path(local_filepath, lipidomics_data),
  phenotype_data_filepath = file.path(local_filepath, phenotype_data),
  name_conversion_key = name_conversion_use
)
```

## Clean Model Data

```{r}
lm_res_pretty <- lm_res %>%
  dplyr::left_join(., name_conversion_use, by = "feature_id") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(name_use)) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    feature_id, compoundName, name_use, model_term, model, coef, se_coef,
    p_value_coef, padj, modality
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = make_names_pretty(model),
    model_term = make_names_pretty(model_term)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Significant = ifelse(padj < 1e-3 & abs(coef) > 0.5, "Yes", "No")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Platform = stringr::str_to_title(modality),
    Platform = factor(Platform, levels = c("Metabolomics", "Lipidomics", "Proteomics"))
  )
```

# Figure 1 

## B: N per diet per timepoint

```{r, fig.width = 0.8, fig.height = 2}
mouse_data <- data_use %>%
  dplyr::filter(modality != "physiological") %>%
  dplyr::select(mouse_id, diet, age_years) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# Calculate counts per diet and age_years
count_data <- mouse_data %>%
  group_by(age_years, diet) %>%
  summarise(n_samples = n(), .groups = "drop")

gg <- ggplot(
  count_data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Age = factor(gsub("year", "", age_years),
      levels = rev(sort(unique(gsub("year", "", age_years))))
    )),
  aes(
    y = Age,
    x = n_samples,
    fill = diet
  )
) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge(
      width = 0.9,
      preserve = "single"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "Age (Year)",
    x = "Count",
    fill = "Diet",
    title = "Sample N",
    subtitle = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = docr_get_diet_colors()) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 100, 200)) +
  annotate("text",
    y = "1",
    x = Inf,
    label = paste0("Year 1 AL\nn = ", max(count_data$n_samples)),
    hjust = 1.3,
    vjust = 0,
    size = 5,
    size.unit = "pt"
  ) +
  docr_ggplot_theme(x_text_angle = 0, x_text_hjust = 0.5)

gg

# docr_ggsave(plot_object = gg,
#             "Fig_1B_SampleN_narrow",
#             plot_width = 0.8,
#             plot_height = 2,
#             local_filepath = local_filepath)
```

## C: Survival Plot

```{r, fig.width = 2, fig.height = 1.8}
# Extract mouse survival data only
mouse_data <- data_use %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(age_years),
    modality != "physiological"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(age_days = surv_days - days_remaining) %>%
  dplyr::select(mouse_id, diet, diet_assignment, age_years, age_days, surv_days) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# Define the time points in days for the vertical lines
timepoint_days <- mouse_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(age_years) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    days = median(age_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

mouse_data <- mouse_data %>%
  dplyr::select(mouse_id, diet = diet_assignment, surv_days) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# Create survival objects and calculate survival probabilities
surv_obj <- survival::survfit(Surv(surv_days) ~ diet,
  data = mouse_data
)
surv_data <- data.frame(
  time = surv_obj$time,
  surv_prob = surv_obj$surv,
  n.event = surv_obj$n.event,
  n.censor = surv_obj$n.censor,
  strata = rep(names(surv_obj$strata), surv_obj$strata)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(diet = gsub("diet=", "", strata))

# Calculate the number of animals starting in each diet group
n_at_risk <- mouse_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(diet) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n_start = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

# Join with survival data to calculate percent surviving
surv_data <- surv_data %>%
  dplyr::left_join(n_at_risk, by = "diet") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_surviving = surv_prob * 100)

# Calculate survival probability at the "year3" time point for each diet
year3_timepoint <- timepoint_days %>%
  dplyr::filter(age_years == "year3") %>%
  dplyr::pull(days)

year1_timepoint <- timepoint_days %>%
  dplyr::filter(age_years == "year1") %>%
  dplyr::pull(days)

surv_at_year3 <- surv_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(diet) %>%
  dplyr::filter(time <= year3_timepoint) %>%
  dplyr::slice_max(time) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    percent_survive_label_pos = ifelse(diet == "1D",
      percent_surviving - 5,
      percent_surviving
    ),
    percent_surv_label_use = paste0(round(percent_surviving, 1), "%")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("surv_prob", "n.event", "n.censor", "strata", "n_start")) %>%
  bind_rows(data.frame(
    time = year1_timepoint,
    diet = "AL",
    percent_surviving = 100,
    percent_survive_label_pos = 100,
    percent_surv_label_use = "DR start"
  ))

# Create the plot
gg <- ggplot(
  surv_data,
  aes(
    x = time,
    y = percent_surviving,
    color = diet
  )
) +
  geom_step() +
  geom_vline(
    data = timepoint_days, aes(xintercept = days),
    linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = timepoint_days,
    aes(
      x = days + 100, y = 105,
      label = paste0("Year ", gsub("year", "", age_years))
    ),
    vjust = 0.2,
    hjust = 0.4,
    size = 5,
    size.unit = "pt",
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = surv_at_year3,
    aes(
      x = c(
        rep(
          year3_timepoint,
          nrow(surv_at_year3) - 1
        ),
        year1_timepoint
      ),
      xend = max(surv_data$time) * 0.75,
      y = percent_surviving,
      yend = percent_surviving,
      color = diet
    ),
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = surv_at_year3,
    aes(
      x = max(surv_data$time) * 0.77,
      y = percent_survive_label_pos,
      label = percent_surv_label_use
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 5,
    size.unit = "pt",
    show.legend = FALSE,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Age (Days)",
    y = "Percent Surviving",
    color = "Diet",
    title = "Survival with Sampling Timepoints"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(surv_data$time)), # Adjust x-axis limit for text
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 115), # Adjust y-axis limit for text
    breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),
    labels = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = docr_get_diet_colors()) +
  docr_ggplot_theme(x_text_angle = 0, x_text_hjust = 0.5)
print(gg)
# docr_ggsave(plot_object = gg,
#             "Fig_1C_Lifespan",
#             plot_width = 2,
#             plot_height = 1.8,
#             local_filepath = local_filepath)
```

## D: Pie Charts

```{r, fig.width = 2, fig.height = 1.2}
summary_mods <- compound_summary %>%
  dplyr::group_by(modality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(prop = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    plot_label = paste0(
      stringr::str_to_title(modality),
      ", n = ", count, " (", round(prop, 1), "%)"
    )
  )

for (mod in unique(compound_summary$modality)) {
  summary1 <- compound_summary %>%
    dplyr::filter(modality == mod) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Broad_Group) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(count = n()) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(prop = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(count)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Broad_Group != "Predicted Gene") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Broad_Group = factor(Broad_Group, levels = Broad_Group))

  mod_title <- summary_mods %>%
    dplyr::filter(modality == mod) %>%
    dplyr::pull(plot_label)

  g <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    summary1,
    aes(
      x = 1.8,
      y = count,
      fill = Broad_Group
    )
  ) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
    scale_fill_brewer(
      palette = "Paired"
    ) +
    coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
    xlim(0.5, 2.5) +
    labs(
      title = mod_title,
      x = "",
      y = ""
    ) +
    docr_ggplot_theme(
      x_text_angle = 0,
      x_text_hjust = 0
    ) +
    theme(
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.2, "cm"),
      plot.margin = unit(c(0.1, 1.8, 0.1, -1.8), "cm"),
      legend.position = c(0.9, 0.5),
      legend.justification = c("left", "center"),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.3, vjust = -5)
    )

  print(g)
  # docr_ggsave(plot_object = g,
  #             paste0("Fig_1D_", stringr::str_to_title(mod)),
  #             plot_width = 2,
  #             plot_height = 1.2,
  #             local_filepath = local_filepath)
}
```

## E: Caterpillar Plot 

```{r, fig.width = 4.8, fig.height = 2.7}
fdr_threshold <- 0.01

# make color palette
temp_colors <- c(docr_get_diet_colors(), docr_get_age_colors(), "white")
names(temp_colors) <- c(
  "DietAL", docr_get_diet_terms(),
  "AgeYear1", docr_get_age_terms(),
  "No"
)

temp_plot <- lm_res_pretty %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    model == "Compound ~ Age + Diet + Bodyweight + Fasting + (1|Mouse)",
    !(model_term %in% c("(Intercept)", "Bodyweight", "FastingFast20", "FastingFast40"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(model_term = factor(model_term, levels = c(docr_get_age_terms(), docr_get_diet_terms()))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-padj) %>%
  fdr_multi(
    pval_var = "p_value_coef",
    nest_vars = c("model", "model_term", "modality")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Significant = ifelse(padj < fdr_threshold, "Yes", "No")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(fill_color = dplyr::case_when(
    Significant == "No" ~ "No",
    Significant == "Yes" ~ as.character(model_term)
  ))

temp_plot_ordered <- temp_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("^Diet", model_term)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(feature_id) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_diet_coef = mean(coef, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::right_join(temp_plot, by = "feature_id") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Platform) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    rank_by_platform = rank(mean_diet_coef, ties.method = "min") / dplyr::n(),
    ordered_id = forcats::fct_reorder(factor(feature_id), rank_by_platform, .desc = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    coef = ifelse(model_term == "Bodyweight",
      coef * 30,
      coef
    ),
    coef = ifelse(coef > 2, 2,
      ifelse(coef < -2 & Platform != "Lipidomics", -2,
        coef
      )
    )
  )

tg_line_data <- temp_plot_ordered %>%
  dplyr::filter(modality == "lipidomics", grepl("^Diet", model_term))

tg_line <- tg_line_data %>%
  {
    min(.$rank_by_platform[!grepl("^TG\\(", .$name_use)])
  }

count_data <- temp_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(Significant == "Yes") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(model_term, Platform) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(label_print = paste0("n = ", count))

name_map <- c(
  AgeYear2 = "Year2",
  AgeYear3 = "Year3",
  Diet1D = "IF-1D",
  Diet2D = "IF-2D",
  Diet20 = "CR-20",
  Diet40 = "CR-40",
  Metabolomics = "Metabolomics",
  Proteomics = "Proteomics",
  Lipidomics = "Lipidomics"
)

g <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  data = temp_plot_ordered,
  mapping = aes(
    y = coef,
    x = rank_by_platform
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey30", alpha = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    mapping = aes(
      color = model_term,
      fill = model_term,
    ),
    alpha = 0.3,
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = count_data,
    mapping = aes(x = 0.5, y = -Inf, label = label_print),
    color = "black",
    vjust = -0.5,
    size = 5 / ggplot2::.pt
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(data = tg_line_data, aes(xintercept = tg_line), color = "grey50", linetype = "dashed") +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = temp_colors) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = paste0("Each compound as a function of age and diet, adjusted for bodyweight and fasting, n count for FDR < ", fdr_threshold),
    y = "Model Estimate",
    x = "Rank-ordered compounds by mean diet estimate, per platform"
  ) +
  docr_ggplot_theme() +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 6)
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(
    cols = vars(model_term),
    rows = vars(Platform), labeller = as_labeller(name_map),
    scales = "free", space = "free"
  )

print(g)

# docr_ggsave(plot_object = g,
#           plot_file_name = paste0("Fig_1E_CaterpillarPlot_NoCovariates_Narrow"),
#           plot_height = 2.7,
#           plot_width = 4.8,
#           local_filepath = local_filepath)
```

## E: Coefficient Correlations

```{r, fig.width = 1.35, fig.height = 1.1}
cor_temp <- lm_res_pretty %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    model == "Compound ~ Age + Diet + Bodyweight + Fasting + (1|Mouse)",
    model_term %in% c(docr_get_diet_terms(), docr_get_age_terms())
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(feature_id, model_term, coef, modality) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = "model_term",
    values_from = "coef"
  ) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("feature_id")

name_map <- c(
  AgeYear2 = "Year2",
  AgeYear3 = "Year3",
  Diet1D   = "IF-1D",
  Diet2D   = "IF-2D",
  Diet20   = "CR-20",
  Diet40   = "CR-40"
)

rename_matrix <- function(mat, name_map) {
  rownames(mat) <- name_map[rownames(mat)]
  colnames(mat) <- name_map[colnames(mat)]
  mat
}

for (m in unique(cor_temp$modality)) {
  temp_lm_res_pretty <- cor_temp %>%
    dplyr::filter(modality %in% m) %>%
    dplyr::select(-modality)

  rcorr_temp <- Hmisc::rcorr(
    x = as.matrix(temp_lm_res_pretty),
    type = "spearman"
  )
  display_r <- rcorr_temp$r

  display_stars <- rcorr_temp$P %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(across(everything(), function(x) {
      case_when(
        x < 0.001 ~ "\u00B7\u00B7\u00B7",
        x < 0.01 ~ "\u00B7\u00B7",
        x < 0.05 ~ "\u00B7",
        # x < 0.001 ~ "***",
        # x < 0.01 ~ "**",
        # x < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    })) %>%
    as.matrix()

  display_p <- matrix(
    display_stars,
    nrow = nrow(display_r),
    dimnames = dimnames(display_r)
  )

  display_r <- rename_matrix(display_r, name_map)
  display_p <- rename_matrix(display_p, name_map)

  ph <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
    mat = display_r,
    main = paste0(stringr::str_to_title(m)),
    color = colorRampPalette(c("#21336B", "white", "#D63B24"))(length(seq(-1, 1, .02))),
    display_numbers = display_p,
    number_color = "black",
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, .02),
    fontsize = 5,
    angle_col = 45,
    fontsize_number = 6,
    treeheight_col = 0,
    treeheight_row = 0,
    show_colnames = T,
    show_rownames = T,
    cluster_cols = T,
    cluster_rows = T,
    border_color = NA
  )
  print(ph)

  # docr_ggsave(plot_object = ph,
  #             plot_file_name = paste0("Fig_1E_CoefCorr_", m),
  #             plot_height = 1.1,
  #             plot_width = 1.35,
  #             local_filepath = local_filepath)
}
```

### Table S2

```{r}
table_s2 <- lm_res_pretty %>%
  dplyr::filter(model == "Compound ~ Age + Diet + Bodyweight + Fasting + (1|Mouse)") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Term = dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("FastingFast20", model_term) ~ "Fasting-Diet20",
    grepl("FastingFast40", model_term) ~ "Fasting-Diet40",
    TRUE ~ model_term
  )) %>%
  dplyr::select(-padj) %>%
  fdr_multi(
    pval_var = "p_value_coef",
    nest_vars = c("model", "Term", "Platform")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Platform,
    Compound = name_use, Model = model,
    Term, Estimate = coef,
    Est_SE = se_coef, Pvalue = p_value_coef, FDR = padj
  )

# write.csv(table_s2, "/Users/johanna/Documents/DOCR-Paper-Files/MS1553_DO_CR_Paper_Normalization/supplemental_tables_final/Table_S2_Diet_Age_Model.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

# Figure 2

## Heatmaps

```{r}
get_top_terms <- function(term_fn, n = 70) {
  test <- lm_res_pretty %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      model_term %in% term_fn(),
      !grepl("TG", name_use),
      model == "Compound ~ Age + Diet + Bodyweight + Fasting + (1|Mouse)"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(name_use) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      combined_padj = metap::sumlog(padj)$p,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(heatmap_name = sub(" \\([+-]\\)$", "", name_use)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(heatmap_name) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(combined_padj) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>% # keep best-ranking polarity per heatmap_name
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::arrange(combined_padj) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(heatmap_name)
}

diet_terms <- get_top_terms(docr_get_diet_terms)
aging_terms <- get_top_terms(docr_get_age_terms)

both <- intersect(diet_terms, aging_terms)
list_loop <- list(
  `Top Aging and Diet` = both,
  `Top Aging Only` = setdiff(aging_terms, both),
  `Top Diet Only` = setdiff(diet_terms, both)
)

global_breaks <- seq(-2, 2, length.out = 101) # max out coefficient at 2--outliers take all color otherwise
n_colors <- length(global_breaks) - 1
global_colors <- colorRampPalette(docr_get_high_low_colors())(n_colors)

annotation_col <- docr_pheatmap_annotations(
  temp_plot,
  `Term` = c(
    "Diet1D" = "1D", "Diet2D" = "2D", "Diet20" = "20", "Diet40" = "40",
    "AgeYear2" = "AgeYear2", "AgeYear3" = "AgeYear3"
  ),
)
annotation_colors <- docr_pheatmap_colors(
  annotation_col,
  `Term` = c(docr_get_diet_colors()[2:5], docr_get_age_colors()[2:3])
)

for (ll in names(list_loop)) {
  temp_plot_use <- lm_res_pretty %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      model_term %in% c(docr_get_age_terms(), docr_get_diet_terms()),
      model == "Compound ~ Age + Diet + Bodyweight + Fasting + (1|Mouse)"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      model_term   = factor(model_term, levels = c(docr_get_age_terms(), docr_get_diet_terms())),
      heatmap_name = sub(" \\([+-]\\)$", "", name_use)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(heatmap_name %in% list_loop[[ll]]) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(model_term, heatmap_name) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      coef = mean(.data$coef, na.rm = TRUE),
      padj = max(.data$padj, na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  ph <- docr_pheatmap(
    temp_plot_use,
    main = ll,
    y_axis_var = "heatmap_name",
    annotation_col = annotation_col,
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    show_rownames = TRUE,
    gaps_col = 2,
    fontsize = 5,
    fontsize_row = 5,
    fontsize_number = 9,
    sig_symbol = "\u00B7",
    sig_numbers = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.05),
    annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
    display_var = "padj",
    pvalue_stars = TRUE,
    cellwidth = 11,
    cellheight = 5,
    treeheight_row = 0,
    color = global_colors,
    breaks = global_breaks
  )

  # docr_ggsave(plot_object = ph,
  #             plot_file_name = paste0("Fig_2B_Heatmap_Top70_P_", ll),
  #             plot_height = nrow(temp_plot_use) * 0.02,
  #             plot_width = 4,
  #             local_filepath = local_filepath)
}
```

### Text: Correlated Term Calculation

```{r}
test <- lm_res_pretty %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    model_term %in% docr_get_diet_terms(),
    model == "Compound ~ Age + Diet + Bodyweight + Fasting + (1|Mouse)",
    padj < 0.01
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(name_use, coef, model_term) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(name_use) %>%
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::n_distinct(model_term) >= 2) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

cat("n total significant diet terms:", length(unique(test$name_use)), "\n")

# remove name_use with fewer than 2 model_terms
test_filtered <- test %>%
  dplyr::group_by(name_use) %>%
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::n_distinct(model_term) >= 2) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(all(coef > 0) | all(coef < 0))) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# Scount anti-correlated name_use
n_anticorrelated <- dplyr::n_distinct(test_filtered$name_use)

# model_terms that appear in anti-correlated name_use
anticorrelated_split <- test_filtered %>%
  dplyr::mutate(model_term = factor(model_term, levels = c("Diet1D", "Diet2D", "Diet20", "Diet40"))) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(name_use) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    term_pair = {
      pos <- paste(sort(model_term[coef > 0]), collapse = ":")
      neg <- paste(sort(model_term[coef < 0]), collapse = ":")
      sides <- c(pos, neg)
      first_terms <- factor(
        stringr::str_extract(sides, "^[^:]+"),
        levels = c("Diet1D", "Diet2D", "Diet20", "Diet40")
      )
      paste(sides[order(first_terms)], collapse = " / ")
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("n anti-correlated name_use:", n_anticorrelated, "\n")
anticorrelated_split %>% dplyr::count(term_pair, sort = TRUE)
```

## Boxplots

```{r, fig.width = 2.8, fig.height = 3.3}
plots <- purrr::map(both, \(i) {
  data_temp <- data_use %>%
    dplyr::filter(name_use == i) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(trait_value) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Age = ifelse(Age == "Year 1", "1", Age)) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Diet = "diet")

  title <- dplyr::case_when(
    i == "ALBU" ~ "Albumin",
    i == "ADIPO" ~ "Adiponectin",
    i == "C9" ~ "Complement C9",
    i == "FA5" ~ "Coagulation F5",
    i == "F13B" ~ "Coagulation F13",
    i == "CFAI" ~ "Complement FI",
    i == "SODE" ~ "Superoxide dismutase 3",
    i == "ITIH3" ~ "ITI-H3",
    i == "AFAM" ~ "Afamin",
    i == "MUP9" ~ "Mup9",
    .default = i
  )

  ggplot2::ggplot(data_temp, aes(x = Diet, color = Diet, fill = Diet, y = trait_value)) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(
      alpha = 0.5, outliers = FALSE, width = 0.7,
      position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = docr_get_diet_colors()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = docr_get_diet_colors()) +
    docr_ggplot_theme(legend_position = "bottom") +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = \(x) c(min(x[1], -1), max(x[2], 1)),
      breaks = \(x) pretty(x, n = 3)
    ) +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(Age), scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
    labs(title = title, y = expression("Log"[2] * " Abundance"), x = "") +
    theme(
      panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "cm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 5),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 5),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
    )
})

pp <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 3) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect", axis_titles = "collect") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 5, 1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = 1)),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(0, 0, 1, 0)),
    legend.margin = margin(t = -15, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(1, "pt"),
    legend.key.size = unit(7, "pt"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(1, 0, 1, 0))
  )
pp

# docr_ggsave(pp, "Fig_2A_All_Boxplots", plot_height = 3.2, plot_width = 2.8, local_filepath = local_filepath)
``` 

# Figure 5

## F-H: Spline fits

```{r, fig.height = 1.3, fig.width = 1}
top_traits <- c("CD5L", "ENV2", "IGHM")

for (trait_use in top_traits) {
  new_data <- data_use %>%
    dplyr::filter(name_use == trait_use) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(trait_value)

  custom_title <- trait_use

  gg <- ggplot2::ggplot(new_data) +
    docr_ggplot_theme(x_text_angle = 0, x_text_hjust = 0.5) +
    geom_smooth(aes(x = PLL, y = trait_value, color = diet, fill = diet),
      method = "loess", level = 0.8, size = 0.5
    ) +
    labs(title = custom_title, y = "Log2 Abundance") +
    scale_color_manual(values = docr_get_diet_colors()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = docr_get_diet_colors()) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = function(x) seq(floor(min(x)), ceiling(max(x)), by = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.25, 0.85)) +
    theme(
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = 1)),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = 1)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 5),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.75),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(0, 0, 2, 0))
    )

  print(gg)

  # docr_ggsave(gg,
  #           paste0("Fig_5_loess_", custom_title),
  #           plot_height = 1.3, plot_width = 1,
  #           local_filepath = local_filepath)
}
```
